name: codeclone
description: Baseline-aware structural review for Claude Desktop through a local CodeClone MCP launcher.
long_description: CodeClone for Claude Desktop wraps the local codeclone-mcp launcher as an MCP bundle. It keeps Claude on the same canonical MCP surface used by the CLI, HTML report, VS Code extension, and Codex plugin — read-only, baseline-aware, local stdio only.

tools.name: analyze_repository
tools.description: Run a baseline-aware CodeClone analysis for the current repository.

tools.name: analyze_changed_paths
tools.description: Run changed-files analysis for PR-style structural review.

tools.name: get_production_triage
tools.description: Return the cheapest production-first hotspot and health snapshot.

tools.name: get_run_summary
tools.description: Cheapest run snapshot: health, findings, baseline, inventory.

tools.name: get_finding
tools.description: Open one canonical finding by id.

tools.name: get_remediation
tools.description: Return remediation guidance for one canonical finding.

tools.name: compare_runs
tools.description: Run-to-run delta: regressions, improvements, health change.

tools.name: evaluate_gates
tools.description: Preview CI gating decisions for the current run.

tools.name: generate_pr_summary
tools.description: PR-friendly markdown or JSON summary of the analysis.

tools.name: help
tools.description: Semantic guide for workflow, analysis profile, baseline, coverage, and review state.

workspace_root.title: Workspace root path
workspace_root.description: Optional absolute path to the Python project root (the directory that contains .venv or venv). When set, the launcher prefers that virtual environment over user-local or system-wide installs. Useful when Claude Desktop starts outside the project directory.

launcher_command.title: CodeClone launcher command
launcher_command.description: Optional absolute path or bare command name for codeclone-mcp. Leave empty to prefer workspace launchers, then user-local paths, then PATH.

launcher_args_json.title: Advanced launcher args (JSON array)
launcher_args_json.description: Optional JSON array of additional codeclone-mcp arguments. Transport is always stdio and cannot be overridden.
